examples: You always sat and looked over to the antechamber.
I have been in the antechamber at the court of Poesy.
Each apartment was designed with an antechamber, a chamber, a cabinet and a cloakroom.
The gallery used the other walls of this antechamber to offer up paintings by Pablo Picasso, Alberto Giacometti and Claude Monet.
The antechamber to the artist's studio is recreated in the exhibition.
